title: Navigation at Sea
summary: Bridge watchkeeping guidance for sea passage planning, handover discipline, and equipment readiness.

excerpts.heading: Watch handover preparation
excerpts.summary: Review standing orders, traffic, weather, and defects before taking over the watch.
excerpts.body: Before watch handover, verify the passage plan status, master's night orders, traffic picture, weather development, and any defects affecting safe navigation.

excerpts.heading: Navigational equipment checks
excerpts.summary: Confirm radar, gyro, echo sounder, AIS, and BNWAS availability at the start of the watch.
excerpts.body: At the beginning of the watch, confirm all required navigation equipment is operational and that any limitation is recorded and escalated.
